ModMetaData.name: [RH2] Rimmu-Nation² - Weapons
ModMetaData.author: Chicken Plucker (Original) CarbineAction (editor)
ModMetaData.description:
HSK/CE/Vile's conversion by CarbineAction. Balanced and converted to work with Hardcore SK, Combat Extended, and Vile's Materials Science. Self-contained — no manual edits needed. Drop in and play.
Converted: 152 weapons (24 pistols, 15 SMGs, 14 shotguns, 34 rifles, 20 snipers/DMRs, 9 MGs, 6 launchers, 3 spacer, 26 melee), 14 ammo types
Changes: - Custom RN workbenches removed, uses HSK workbenches - 152 weapon recipes with HSK materials (Metallic category, Weapon Components, Crafted Wood for wooden stocks) - CE weapon stats tuned to HSK values - 14 ammo types bundled (408CheyTac, 338Lapua, 50AE, 9x18mm, and more) - 22 sound aliases created for missing CE sound references - 8 bolt-action/DMR weapons removed (CE toughness autopatch incompatibility)
Removed weapons: Dragunov SVD, PSL-54, Mosin Nagant, Kar98k, SV-98, Mannlicher Schoenauer, Mannlicher Ultra Light, Lee Enfield Mk III
Credits: Chicken Plucker - Weapon art Fiendakko - Weapon art TMC - Weapon art Erok - Weapon art Dandman68 - Weapon art qux - Troubleshooting Taranchuk - Update of the WeaponsExtension.dll which makes the Auger work Jecrell - Original WeaponsExtension.dll creator ThatCoolSnek - Weapons research fixes Samael - Rebalancing, CE patch (Now integrated into CE itself) Autumn Point Eclipse - CE patch (Now integrated into CE itself)
